RCSB title: MALATE DEHYDROGENASE FROM AQUASPIRILLUM ARCTICUM. Entity description: PROTEIN (MALATE DEHYDROGENASE). Entry keywords: OXIDOREDUCTASE DEHYDROGENASE, OXIDOREDUCTASE.
